content.title: 📌 Two Common App Issues and Quick Fixes!
content.subtitle: Turning off the prayer alarm and showing the Hijri date
content.body:
Assalamu Alaikum. Recently, we have received some feedback and queries regarding the prayer alarm and Hijri date. Below are the simple steps to resolve these issues:

⏰ How do I turn off the prayer alarm?

Right below the prayer timetable on the app's homepage, there is a button named "Alarm." By clicking there, you can easily turn the alarm on or off for any prayer according to your needs, InshaAllah.

📅 What should I do if the Hijri date is not visible?

On some devices, the updated Hijri date data might not have downloaded, which is why the Hijri date may not be showing. To fix this, please follow these steps:

  1. Make sure your phone's internet connection (Data/Wi-Fi) is turned on.

  2. Go to the Muslims Day app homepage and Pull to Refresh (swipe down from the top of the screen, just like you refresh Facebook or YouTube).

InshaAllah, following these steps will resolve the issues. If you still face any difficulties, our support team is always here to assist you. Please feel free to reach out to us at any time.

Thank you for being with us!

footer_button.hint: For any app-related support/needs, please contact the Muslims Day team
